overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through Night City. The player character moves through neon-lit urban streets, transitioning from covered walkways under overpasses to open plazas surrounded by towering skyscrapers with massive digital billboards, then through narrow commercial alleys with vibrant pink signage.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily under the concrete overpass toward a large green neon arrow sign

entered.detail: massive concrete support pillars and overhead highway structure
large illuminated green arrow with Japanese text indicating 24-hour service
large digital advertisement with yellow text on dark background
purple and blue illuminated hotel signage
green metal barrier separating sidewalk from street

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a massive concrete overpass in a sheltered walkway. The camera moves forward toward a prominent green neon arrow sign, with wet pavement reflecting the artificial lighting. Metal railings line the right side, and digital billboards are visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza intersection surrounded by skyscrapers

events.description: exits covered overpass into open plaza with towering skyscrapers
turns left to navigate through the open plaza area

agents.ego_description: turning left and walking through the open plaza surrounded by towering buildings with digital billboards

entered.detail: tall futuristic building with illuminated windows rising into the night sky
rounded high-rise building with multiple balconies and lit windows
orange and yellow metal barriers blocking off sections of the plaza

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway, the scene opens into a vast urban plaza surrounded by towering skyscrapers. The camera turns left, revealing curved residential towers and glass office buildings covered in digital advertisements. Yellow barriers line the wet asphalt ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow commercial street with pink neon signage

events.description: turns left onto a narrower street lined with pink and red neon lights
passes other pedestrians walking on the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking down a narrow street illuminated by vibrant pink neon signs and red paper lanterns, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: walking toward camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: traditional red paper lanterns and pink neon signage illuminating the storefronts
low-rise commercial buildings with air conditioning units and signage
external AC units mounted on the building exterior
garbage bags piled near the building wall

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left into a narrower commercial street bathed in pink and red neon light. Traditional paper lanterns hang outside storefronts while pedestrians walk along the wet pavement. Air conditioning units and trash bags line the left side of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza in front of industrial building with massive digital billboards

events.description: emerges into open plaza facing a building with large digital advertisements
black car drives past on the right side of the frame

agents.ego_description: crossing the street toward a building with massive illuminated billboards while vehicles pass by

notable_agents.action: black car driving past the plaza on the wet street

entered.detail: massive digital billboard displaying 'MINDFUCK' with anime-style characters
large illuminated advertisement showing a portrait of a man
industrial building facade with large circular ventilation grilles
several parked vehicles along the right side of the street

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a plaza facing an industrial building covered in massive digital billboards. The camera crosses the street toward the building, passing parked cars while a vehicle drives by. The 'MINDFUCK' billboard dominates the center of the view with bright purple and blue lighting.

events.description: turns right to walk parallel to the industrial building wall
vehicle drives past on the adjacent road to the right

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk next to an industrial building with large circular vents, parallel to the street

entered.detail: green metal railing separating the sidewalk from the street
tall street lamp illuminating the walkway

segments.scene_description: Turning right, the camera walks along a narrow sidewalk beside the industrial building. The large circular ventilation grilles of the building wall dominate the left side, while a metal railing separates the walkway from the street where occasional vehicles pass by.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-drenched urban landscape, transitioning from a sheltered concrete underpass into wide plazas and narrow commercial corridors. It begins beneath a massive overpass in a sheltered walkway, moving past a green neon arrow across wet, reflective pavement. As the camera emerges from the cover, the scene opens into a vast plaza surrounded by towering skyscrapers and curved residential towers before turning left into a narrow street bathed in pink and red neon light and lined with paper lanterns. The view then expands into another plaza where the camera crosses the street toward an industrial building dominated by a massive, purple-and-blue digital billboard. Finally, the camera turns right to follow a narrow sidewalk, passing large circular ventilation grilles and a metal railing as vehicles drive by in the street.
